{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Dakata
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Underlord (novel)|Underlord]]
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Dakata]] possesses self-control.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c9">''Wintersteel'', chapter 9</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
